package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_pprof_endpoint_enabled_without_sampling_plan: Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag always-on profiling endpoints in production services without access or sampling controls.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule578PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario578Positive(records []Rule578PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
